headline: Should You Buy Amphenol Corporation (APH)’s Shares?
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Richard Chilton. Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the largest electronics components companies in the world. Its shares are up by 70% over the past year and by 18.2% year-to-date.
